title: Lab Fingerprint
description: Identifies a lab's likely preprocessing pipeline based on key authors, affiliations, and historical software preferences. Governs files at kb/labs/{lab_slug}.yaml.

lab.description: Canonical lab name, e.g. 'CMI / Milham Lab'.

key_authors.description: Key authors associated with this lab.

period.description: Time range this preference applies to, e.g. '2018-present'.

likely_pipeline.description: Likely pipeline / tool stack used by the lab during this period.

confidence.description: Confidence in this attribution, 0 to 1 inclusive.

basis.description: Why this attribution is made (e.g. published methods sections, GitHub commits).

software_preferences.description: Software preferences for this lab over time.

fingerprint_rules.description: Descriptive rules that identify outputs from this lab's pipelines.

last_updated.description: Date this fingerprint was last reviewed (YYYY-MM-DD).
